title: Many paths lead to immunology.
author_string: García-Sáez, Ana J, Domingos, Ana I, Gutkind, J Silvio, Mattoo, Seema, Du, Peng
abstract: While some people pore over the textbook and train through the classics of the field, many scientists come to immunology when they discover it intersecting with their "first love" interests. Five of these "accidental immunologists" tell us how they found their way to a fascination with the immune system.
